data.title: Bitcoin enthusiasts wary of institutions; Preston Pysh notes concerns over them engaging in "institutional-like behaviors" with Bitcoin in recent interview.
data.description: Bitcoin enthusiasts are expressing worry about institutions engaging in activities typical of traditional financial institutions with Bitcoin, according to Preston Pysh in a recent podcast.

data.title: Bitcoin surges to $117K, wiping out bear positions and setting stage for record highs post Fed's Jackson Hole Symposium.
data.description: Following the Jackson Hole Symposium's closing speech, Bitcoin surged towards its range highs as the Federal Reserve suggested a potential policy shift. The cryptocurrency saw a notable increase in value as a response to this indication.

data.title: KB Home opens 3 new communities in Erie, Colorado's Canyon Creek area. Offers modern homes blending scenic beauty and outdoor recreation.
data.description: In Erie, Colorado, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) has unveiled The Nest Classic, Reserve, and Villas at Canyon Creek, comprising three new-home communities. This renowned homebuilder has introduced these developments in response to the high demand for housing in the area, situated between Denver and Boulder. Erie is a charming town known for its picturesque surroundings, active community, and plentiful outdoor activities. The new homes are tailored to modern living preferences, boasting contemporary kitchen designs and other popular amenities to cater to residents' needs.

data.title: Lennar unveils North River Farms in Oceanside, CA with 17 home designs, aiming to boost housing in the area.
data.description: Lennar, a prominent homebuilder in the United States, has officially launched North River Farms in Oceanside, California on August 22, 2025. This newly unveiled master-planned community features a variety of 17 unique home designs for single-family residences. North River Farms is set to offer a wide selection for potential homeowners in Oceanside.

data.title: Fed Chair Powell's speech led to Friday rally, hitting S&P 500 and Dow Jones to new highs. Nvidia earnings anticipate.
data.description: Chairman Powell's speech, emphasizing a dovish stance, sparked a significant rally on Friday. Both the S&P 500 and Dow Jones surged to reach record highs, while various stocks indicated buy opportunities. Investors are now eagerly awaiting Nvidia's earnings report. This surge was noted in the Dow Jones Futures, indicating a positive trajectory in the stock market following Powell's remarks.

data.title: Palma School renovates gym with $2.5M from Edward M. Dowd Foundation, largest donation in history.
data.description: Palma School in Salinas, California, has recently announced the completion of the renovation of the Edward M. Dowd Gymnasium on August 22, 2025. This project was realized thanks to a generous $2.5 million contribution from the Edward M. Dowd Foundation. This donation stands as the largest single gift ever received by the school in its 74-year history.

data.title: Premier Lacrosse League achieves record viewership with peak of 833,000 on ABC; growth reported across business units.
data.description: In New York on August 22, 2025, the Premier Lacrosse League (PLL) partnered with Ticketmaster disclosed significant progress in all business sectors during the 2025 Regular Season. Notably, the league achieved a historic milestone with a record peak viewership of 833,000 on ABC during Week 3. Furthermore, the average viewership on both ABC and ESPN also displayed notable growth.

data.title: SharpLink Gaming, backed by Ethereum Treasury, plans to buy back $1.5 billion in stock.
data.description: SharpLink Gaming announced a new buyback program allowing the company to repurchase up to $1.5 billion worth of their common stock. This initiative was revealed by the Ethereum treasury firm.

data.title: Faircourt Asset Management Inc. announces August distribution for Faircourt Fund (CBOE:FGX).
data.description: In Toronto on August 22, 2025, Faircourt Asset Management Inc., acting as the Manager of the Faircourt Fund (CBOE:FGX), has reported a monthly distribution for the Fund's Shares.

data.title: 1MORE introduces Pixie Mini wireless microphone for content creators, offering studio-quality audio in compact design.
data.description: 1MORE, a renowned global audio brand known for its award-winning headphones and advanced acoustic engineering, has unveiled its inaugural wireless microphone, the 1MORE Pixie Mini. The release comes as a response to a growing demand for high-quality audio equipment, with the microphone promising studio-level sound in a compact and lightweight design. The launch, which took place in SHENZHEN, China on Aug. 22, 2025, marks a significant milestone for the brand diversifying its product range.
Japan defense minister to visit South Korea early September: Nikkei

data.title: Former software developer gets 4-year sentence for disrupting company's network with malicious code in 2019.
data.description: According to prosecutors, in 2019, a former software developer at Eaton Corporation created and implemented malicious code that caused servers on the company's network to crash.

data.title: Dow Jones jumps 800 points as Powell hints at rate cut; Nvidia earnings anticipated. All-time high.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index reached a record high, surging by 800 points amidst growing optimism regarding a potential rate cut at the upcoming September Federal Reserve meeting. This significant leap in the stock market was influenced by positive remarks from Powell, further fueling expectations for a decrease in interest rates. Additionally, there is anticipation surrounding Nvidia earnings which could impact market trends.

data.title: Stock market rallies to new highs post dovish Powell speech, S&P 500 and Dow Jones surge. Nvidia earnings awaited.
data.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell's optimistic remarks sparked a significant surge on Friday, leading to record highs for both the S&P 500 and Dow Jones indices. Additionally, a number of stocks indicated advantageous buying opportunities. The impending Nvidia earnings announcement is eagerly anticipated. The market rally in response to Powell's comments suggests a positive outlook for investors, with the Dow Jones Futures trending towards higher levels.

data.title: Mustang Energy completes sampling program at Surprise Creek Project, Saskatchewan. Acquired 80% interest from Thunderbird Resources.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on August 22, 2025, Mustang Energy Corp. (CSE: MEC, OTC:MECPF, FRA:92T) announced the successful completion of the initial phase of field exploration on the Surprise Creek Uranium-Copper Project in a promising area northwest of the Athabasca Basin. The company has secured an 80% interest in the Project through an option agreement with Thunderbird Resources Ltd. More information on this agreement can be found in the Company's press releases from June 4, 2025, and June 16, 2025, available on the Company’s SEDAR+ profile.

data.title: Tige Boats introduces redesigned RZX Class for 2026 - 24RZX and 22RZX surf boats, bigger and more luxurious.
data.description: An exciting update comes from Abilene, Texas as Tige Boats, Inc. reveals the innovative RZX Class for 2026, marking a significant shift for the brand. The 24RZX and 22RZX surf boats are the stars of this redesign, boasting a blend of spaciousness and opulence. This revamped class promises enhanced features, set to elevate the boating experience. Get ready to experience luxury like never before with the all-new RZX Class from Tige Boats, Inc.

data.title: Metalsource secures $50,000 loan at 5% interest, issues 25,000 warrants at $0.20 per share to lender.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on August 22, 2025, MetalSource Mining Inc. (referred to as "Metalsource" or the "Company") disclosed that it has finalized a loan agreement with a third party at arm’s length, referred to as the “Lender”. As per the agreement, Metalsource will be borrowing $50,000 from the Lender with an annual interest rate set at 5%. Furthermore, in addition to the loan, the Company will also be granting the Lender 25,000 warrants, allowing them to purchase shares at $0.20 each over a 2-year period. The Company's shares trade on the Canadian Securities Exchange under the ticker symbol "MSM".
